sentences.text: The musical that we saw last night was so impressive that everyone in the audience stood up to applaud.
sentences.translation_zh: 我们昨晚看的那部音乐剧太令人印象深刻了，观众中的每个人都站起来鼓掌。
sentences.translation_vi: Vo nhac kich chung toi xem toi qua an tuong den noi tat ca khan gia deu dung day vo tay.

sentences.text: The actors rehearsed their lines for weeks before the opening night of the play.
sentences.translation_zh: 演员们在话剧首演之夜前排练了数周的台词。
sentences.translation_vi: Cac dien vien da tap luyen loi thoai hang tuan truoc dem khai mac vo kich.

sentences.text: Although the costumes were simple, the performance itself was absolutely captivating.
sentences.translation_zh: 虽然服装很简单，但表演本身绝对引人入胜。
sentences.translation_vi: Mac du trang phuc don gian, nhung bieu dien rat cuon hut.

sentences.text: The director told the cast that they needed to project their voices more clearly during the second act.
sentences.translation_zh: 导演告诉演员们，他们需要在第二幕中更清晰地投射声音。
sentences.translation_vi: Dao dien noi voi doan dien vien rang ho can phat am ro rang hon trong man hai.

sentences.text: If you book your tickets online in advance, you can get a significant discount on the best seats.
sentences.translation_zh: 如果你提前在线预订票，你可以在最好的座位上获得大幅折扣。
sentences.translation_vi: Neu ban dat ve truc tuyen truoc, ban co the duoc giam gia dang ke cho nhung cho ngoi tot nhat.

sentences.text: The ballet dancer who performed the lead role had trained at the Royal Academy since childhood.
sentences.translation_zh: 表演主角的芭蕾舞演员从小就在皇家学院接受训练。
sentences.translation_vi: Vu cong ballet bieu dien vai chinh da duoc dao tao tai Hoc vien Hoang gia tu nho.

sentences.text: When the curtain rose, the audience fell silent and focused their attention on the dimly lit stage.
sentences.translation_zh: 当幕布升起时，观众安静下来，将注意力集中在昏暗的舞台上。
sentences.translation_vi: Khi man san khau keo len, khan gia im lang va tap trung chu y vao san khau thieu anh sang.

sentences.text: The playwright is famous for writing stories that explore complex human emotions and relationships.
sentences.translation_zh: 这位剧作家以写作探索复杂人类情感和关系的故事而闻名。
sentences.translation_vi: Nha viet kich noi tieng voi viec viet nhung cau chuyen kham pha cam xuc va moi quan he phuc tap cua con nguoi.

sentences.text: The stage crew worked behind the scenes to ensure that every scene change happened smoothly.
sentences.translation_zh: 舞台工作人员在幕后工作，确保每次场景切换都顺利进行。
sentences.translation_vi: Doan lam viec san khau lam viec sau hau truong de dam bao moi su thay doi canh dieu dien ra suon se.

sentences.text: The theatre company announced that they would be performing a modern adaptation of Romeo and Juliet.
sentences.translation_zh: 剧团宣布他们将演出罗密欧与朱丽叶的现代改编版。
sentences.translation_vi: Doan kich thong bao rang ho se bieu dien mot phien ban hien dai cua Romeo va Juliet.

sentences.text: Because the show was sold out, we had to wait in line for returned tickets.
sentences.translation_zh: 因为演出票已售罄，我们不得不排队等退票。
sentences.translation_vi: Vi buoi dien da ban het ve, chung toi phai xep hang cho ve tra lai.

sentences.text: Opera singers must train their voices for many years before they can perform on a professional stage.
sentences.translation_zh: 歌剧歌手必须训练声音多年才能在专业舞台上表演。
sentences.translation_vi: Ca si opera phai luyen giong nhieu nam truoc khi ho co the bieu dien tren san khau chuyen nghiep.

sentences.text: The comedian made the audience laugh so hard that some people had tears rolling down their cheeks.
sentences.translation_zh: 喜剧演员让观众笑得如此厉害，以至于有些人眼泪从脸颊上滚落。
sentences.translation_vi: Dien vien hai lam khan gia cuoi qua nhieu den noi mot so nguoi roi nuoc mat tren ma.

sentences.text: The sound technician explained that the microphones needed to be tested before every performance.
sentences.translation_zh: 音响技术员解释说麦克风需要在每次演出前进行测试。
sentences.translation_vi: Ky thuat vien am thanh giai thich rang micro can duoc kiem tra truoc moi buoi bieu dien.

sentences.text: Street performers, who can be found in most major cities, add a vibrant cultural atmosphere to public spaces.
sentences.translation_zh: 街头表演者可以在大多数大城市找到，为公共空间增添了充满活力的文化氛围。
sentences.translation_vi: Nghe si duong pho, co the tim thay o hau het cac thanh pho lon, them bau khong khi van hoa soi dong cho khong gian cong cong.
